source.title: Accident Investigation Report - Cox Operating L.L.C. - Eugene Island 259 C Facility

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Eugene Island Block 259

event.summary: On October 13, 2023, at approximately 1745 hours, a crane mechanic fell approximately 96 ft from the gantry of a crane into the water at Cox Operating's Eugene Island 259 C Facility. While attempting to replace the auxiliary winch, the crane mechanic positioned himself over the handrail without wearing a safety harness or life vest to remove a brace blocking the winch installation. When the second bolt broke, the brace detached and contacted the crane mechanic, causing him to fall over the handrails. He suffered a fractured rib, dislocated shoulder, and internal bleeding.
recommendations: BSEE Lafayette District office makes no recommendations to the Regional Office of Incident Investigations
key_phrases: fell approximately 96 ft from the gantry
without a harness or life vest
fractured rib, dislocated shoulder, and internal bleeding
failed to wear the safety harness
platform operators did not monitor or visit the site
failed to conduct a stop work authority

hazards.name: Work at Height - Crane Gantry Operations

threats.name: Worker positioned over handrail without fall protection
Inadequate guardrail height (38 inches vs required 42 inches)
Inadequate hazard analysis for scope change
Lack of supervision during high-risk work

consequences.name: Personnel fall from 96 ft height into water
Severe personnel injury (fractured rib, dislocated shoulder, internal bleeding)

controls.name: Safety Harness and Lanyard System
controls.lod_basis: Primary personal protective equipment for fall protection

supporting_text: Without a harness or life vest, the CM positioned himself over the handrail on the gantry of the crane
the CM failed to wear the safety harness when reaching over the handrail or climbing onto the gantry
Even though the Job Safety Analysis discusses the use of a safety harness, the CM failed to wear the safety harness
As per 33 CFR 142.42, personnel engaged in an activity where there is a hazard of falling 10 or more feet shall wear a safety belt or harness secured by a lanyard

controls.name: Life Vest for Water Proximity Work
controls.barrier_role: Mitigate drowning risk after fall into water
controls.lod_basis: Recovery equipment to prevent drowning after fall

supporting_text: Without a harness or life vest, the CM positioned himself over the handrail on the gantry of the crane

controls.name: Guardrail System on Crane Gantry
controls.barrier_role: Physical barrier to prevent fall from height
controls.lod_basis: Primary passive engineering control for fall prevention

supporting_text: The guard rail on the gantry was 38 inches high
As per 33 CFR 143.110(a), The guard rail or fence shall be at least 42 inches high
Work Environment: The guard rail onto the gantry was 38 inches high

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA)
controls.barrier_role: Identify hazards and required controls before work

supporting_text: Even though the Job Safety Analysis discusses the use of a safety harness, the CM failed to wear the safety harness
the CM failed to conduct a stop work authority and readdress the Job Safety Analysis when the decision was made to remove the brace
Management Systems: Inadequate hazard analysis - Also, the CM failed to conduct a stop work authority and readdress the Job Safety Analysis

controls.name: Stop Work Authority
controls.barrier_role: Enable workers to halt work when conditions change or hazards emerge

supporting_text: the CM failed to conduct a stop work authority and readdress the Job Safety Analysis when the decision was made to remove the brace
Management Systems: Inadequate hazard analysis - Also, the CM failed to conduct a stop work authority

controls.name: On-site Supervision and Monitoring
controls.barrier_role: Verify compliance with safety procedures during high-risk work

supporting_text: During the duration that the CM and helper were replacing the winch, the person in charge of the platform did not monitor or visit the site where the incident occurred
No Supervision: During the duration when the CM and the helper were replacing the winch, platform operators did not monitor or visit the site where the incident occurred

controls.name: Hot Work Permit
controls.barrier_role: Control hazardous work activities requiring grinding/cutting
controls.lod_basis: Primary authorization and hazard control for hot work

supporting_text: The AI requested additional information pertaining to the incident such as: the Job Safety Analysis (JSA), Hot Work Permit, statements, and other relevant documents from Cox
Utilizing a grinder, the CM attempted to remove the bolts

controls.name: Emergency Response and Rescue
controls.barrier_role: Rescue personnel from water and provide medical care

supporting_text: The CM was retrieved from the water and complained of soreness in his hip and shoulder
An aircraft transported the CM to a medical facility

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
